channel.title: Tianxiang Zheng · Blog & Updates
channel.description: Thoughts, updates, and tools from Tianxiang Zheng on automation, teaching, and collaborative research.

item.title: Auto Calendar: Converting Emails into Outlook Schedules
item.description: Workflow notes on chaining Azure Logic Apps, GPT-4o-mini classification, and Microsoft Graph so project emails become a trusted Outlook calendar.

item.title: How I Switched from GitHub Copilot to ChatGPT Pro + Codex
item.description: Why I replaced GitHub Copilot with Codex, how AGENTS.md and TODO.md guide the agent, and what vibe coding looks like with GitHub sync.

item.title: How I Built an AI Calendar Generator
item.description: First entry in the How I (Almost) AI Everything series, mapping the workflow for an AI-assisted scheduling assistant that keeps fieldwork aligned.

item.title: Designing labour transitions for inclusive automation
item.description: An extended brief on the policy design principles guiding automation transition programmes in São Paulo and Ho Chi Minh City.

item.title: Reproducible econometrics sprints
item.description: A teaching lab note on bringing software-engineering rituals to student research projects with manageable guardrails.

item.title: Municipal automation dashboard playbook
item.description: Documentation and governance checklist for the automation exposure dashboards developed with labour ministries.
